sourceAttribution.name: kevincui1034/preprod-check
sourceAttribution.importedAs: ProofLoop deterministic preprod readiness receipt, not a runtime Claude plugin dependency.

checks.title: Preprod-check source attribution is recorded
checks.description: ProofLoop tracks the imported rubric source instead of silently copying checklist claims.

checks.title: Production gate chains security, typecheck, tests, browser product memory, build, and dist security
checks.description: A release claim must be backed by a single reproducible gate.
checks.finding: prod:gate is missing one or more release-safety sub-gates.
checks.fix: Restore security, typecheck, full tests, product-memory browser checks, build, and dist security in prod:gate.

checks.title: Published npx proofloop package is registry-verified end to end
checks.description: The portable ProofLoop claim must be proven through the npm registry, not a local checkout or GitHub shortcut.
checks.finding: Published npx proofloop package proof is missing or failed.
checks.fix: Run npm run benchmark:proofloop:npx-package -- --strict and commit the refreshed receipt.

checks.title: Static Vercel security headers are configured
checks.description: CSP, HSTS, frame, referrer, permissions, and nosniff headers are required before prod claims.
checks.finding: Required production security headers are absent from vercel.json.
checks.fix: Restore CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, X-Content-Type-Options, Permissions-Policy, and COOP.

checks.title: Production URL serves required security headers
checks.description: Static config is not enough; prod must actually serve the headers.
checks.finding: Production URL is missing one or more required security headers.
checks.fix: Fix Vercel headers and redeploy before production claims.

checks.title: Production story smoke has run against the live URL
checks.description: A prod claim should include a browser-visible route proof, not only build logs.
checks.fix: Fix the live story route or deployment before production claims.

checks.sourceCategory: secrets / env, external-request safety, AI / LLM safety
checks.title: Browser bundle is guarded from direct model-provider egress
checks.description: OpenRouter and direct provider keys must stay behind server-side actions and model adapters.
checks.finding: Provider egress guard evidence is missing.
checks.fix: Restore browser provider-host scans and provider egress policy tests.

checks.title: SSRF and upload-storage boundaries have executable tests
checks.description: Server-side URL fetches and uploaded files must reject private network and unsafe storage paths.
checks.finding: SSRF/upload boundary test evidence is missing.
checks.fix: Restore fetch-source network guard and uploaded file storage contract tests.

checks.title: .env.local is gitignored and tracked files are scanned for secret-shaped values
checks.description: Production readiness requires no provider secrets in tracked files or client env.
checks.verifier: git check-ignore plus security-gate secret-pattern scan
checks.finding: .env.local is not ignored or secret-pattern scanning is missing.
checks.fix: Ensure .env.local is ignored and restore likely-secret scanning in security-gate.

checks.title: Room auth and private artifact tenancy boundaries have tests
checks.description: Room tokens, active membership, and private artifacts must be re-checked server-side.
checks.verifier: auth helper and test file presence
checks.fix: Restore room token validation and private artifact visibility tests.

checks.title: Credit ledger and charge settlement paths have tests
checks.description: Agent spend and credit settlement must not silently overdraw or double-charge.
checks.finding: Credit ledger integrity proof is missing.
checks.fix: Restore credit ledger and Convex credit settlement tests.

checks.sourceCategory: rate limiting, cost containment, AI / LLM safety
checks.title: Agent runs have step, deadline, and cost accounting caps
checks.description: Runaway agent loops and prompt-injection cost attacks need hard caps before external calls.
checks.verifier: agent run cap token scan plus tests
checks.finding: Agent cost/step cap proof is missing.
checks.fix: Restore maxSteps/deadline/cost accounting and token-limit tests.

checks.title: Room join abuse is rate-limited and capped
checks.description: Anonymous room joins need cheap rejection before work is created.
checks.finding: Room join rate-limit evidence is missing.
checks.fix: Restore room member caps and join-rate limiting.

checks.title: Prompt-injection, provider egress, and benchmark contamination defenses are tested
checks.description: Model output must not cross trust boundaries or contaminate evaluator-only artifacts.
checks.finding: AI/LLM safety test evidence is missing.
checks.fix: Restore prompt-injection, provider egress, and contamination tests.

checks.title: SLO and architecture budget gates are present
checks.description: Production readiness needs a cheap deterministic SLO and architecture budget guard.
checks.verifier: SLO and architecture gate file presence
checks.finding: SLO or architecture budget gate is missing.
checks.fix: Restore slo:gate and architecture:budget proof scripts.

checks.title: Trace workpapers and ProofLoop artifacts are tested
checks.description: Incidents and regressions need trace IDs, receipts, and replayable evidence.
checks.verifier: trace test and artifact file presence
checks.fix: Restore NodeAgent trace spine and ProofLoop artifact tests.

checks.title: Known risky lanes have explicit feature gates or kill switches
checks.description: A release must have a way to disable risky agent behavior without changing benchmark receipts.
checks.verifier: feature gate token scan plus runbook
checks.fix: Document and preserve kill switches for agent spend enforcement, passive job execution, and provider egress.

checks.title: ProofLoop preprod release runbook is tracked
checks.description: A human must be able to rerun gates, inspect live proof, and roll back.
checks.fix: Add a runbook with gate commands, rollback path, kill switches, and restore evidence expectations.

checks.title: External backup restore rehearsal evidence is attached
checks.description: Convex/Vercel backup restore state is external to this repository and needs a dated receipt.
checks.finding: Attach a dated restore rehearsal receipt before treating restore-readiness as proven.
checks.fix: Record the latest restore rehearsal ID/date/link in docs/eval/proofloop-preprod-readiness.json or a waiver.

checks.title: Privacy, ToS, and data-deletion posture are a product/legal decision
checks.description: This repo can track evidence, but legal readiness is not inferable from code alone.
checks.finding: Attach privacy/ToS/data deletion review before broad public launch claims.
checks.fix: Add legal evidence links or mark the deployment as internal/demo only.

verifiedCriticalHigh.verifier: git check-ignore plus security-gate secret-pattern scan
auth helper and test file presence
agent run cap token scan plus tests
SLO and architecture gate file presence
feature gate token scan plus runbook

headers.content-security-policy: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; connect-src 'self' https://*.convex.cloud https://*.convex.site wss://*.convex.cloud wss://*.convex.site https://openrouter.ai; media-src 'self' blob: data:; worker-src 'self' blob:; manifest-src 'self'; upgrade-insecure-requests
headers.permissions-policy: camera=(), microphone=(self), geolocation=(), payment=(), usb=(), serial=(), bluetooth=(), interest-cohort=()

manualEvidenceRequired: backup-restore-rehearsal: Attach a dated restore rehearsal receipt before treating restore-readiness as proven.

recommendations: Run the static preprod receipt before every ProofLoop release claim.
Run the live preprod receipt against noderoom.live before claiming production is healthy.
Treat unwaived Critical/High failures as ship blockers; keep manual ops checks visible until external evidence exists.
Keep preprod findings as ProofLoop work items with owner, expiry, evidence, and waiver history.
